title: Brewery Texture Pack
description: Texture pack which adds textures for the brewery potions
body:
# Created with Craftbench AI
## ENG:
This texture pack adds textures for brewery plugin
### Requirements:
- Optifine or [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium) with [CIT Resewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn) mod
- Brewery plugin
## RU:
Этот текстур пак добавляет текстуры для плагина Brewery
### Требования:
- Optifine или [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium) с [CIT Resewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn)
- Плагин Brewery
